{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Garrylondryth
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Garrylondryth]] is the [[Rootfather]] and was once the right hand of the [[Dragon King]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
